title: AI agents
intro: User-facing or developer-facing systems that expose LLM-based capabilities through chat interfaces, APIs, integrated tools, memory, connectors, or multi-step execution.

items.name: ChatGPT
items.description: A generative AI chatbot created by OpenAI that can function as a conversational assistant and as an AI agent capable of using tools and leveraging memory.
features: State-of-the-art performance across a wide range of natural language tasks.
Strong reasoning, coding, and creative text generation capabilities.
Contextual understanding and memory in conversations.
Multilingual support, voice mode, and web search capabilities.
items.models: GPT-4, GPT-4o, GPT-4o mini, GPT-5, GPT-5.5, and specialized o-series models.
items.pricing: Free plan; paid plans starting at $20/month; API usage-based pricing.

items.name: Gemini
items.description: A generative AI chatbot from Google built on a family of multimodal LLMs. Through its web interface and API, Gemini can access external tools and perform context-aware tasks.
features: Native multimodality allows it to understand and combine text, images, audio, video, and code.
A very long context window for processing large amounts of information.
Integration with Google applications such as Gmail, Docs, and Sheets.
items.models: Gemini Ultra, Gemini Pro, Gemini Flash, and Gemini Nano, including the latest 3.5 series.
items.pricing: Free plan; paid plans starting at $19.99/month; API usage-based pricing.

items.name: Claude
items.description: An AI assistant and family of LLMs from Anthropic, known for its strong emphasis on safety and ethical behavior. Claude functions as both an AI assistant and an AI agent.
features: Advanced reasoning and problem-solving capabilities.
A large context window for processing and analyzing long documents.
Vision capabilities for analyzing images, charts, and graphs.
items.models: Claude 3.5 Haiku, Claude 5 Sonnet, Claude 5.5 Sonnet, and Claude Opus 5.
items.pricing: Free plan; paid plans starting at $20/month; API usage-based pricing.

items.name: Meta AI
items.description: An AI assistant created by Meta that can serve as an agent, supporting dialogue, reasoning, and tool use, integrated into Meta's ecosystem of products.
features: Conversational AI and generative capabilities for text, images, and video.
AI-powered search and personalized recommendations.
Real-time voice conversations and integration with Meta services.
items.models: The Llama family of models, including Llama 4 and Llama 5 series.
items.pricing: Free plan; Meta AI+ subscription at $10/month; API usage-based pricing.

items.name: Perplexity AI
items.description: An AI-powered conversational search engine that synthesizes web knowledge into concise, natural-language answers with citations.
features: Real-time web search capabilities.
Conversational AI for interactive querying.
Provides clickable citations for verification.
Focus modes to refine search results, including academic papers or news.
items.models: Access to advanced AI models including GPT-5.5, Claude 5.5 Sonnet, and proprietary Sonar models.
items.pricing: Free plan; paid plans starting at $20/month.

items.name: Manus
items.description: Autonomous general AI agent product designed to execute complex tasks end-to-end.
features: Autonomous task execution, including planning and reasoning.
Integration of multiple models and tools to complete delegated tasks.
Capabilities spanning coding, research, and data analysis.

items.name: Microsoft Copilot
items.description: A generative AI chatbot developed by Microsoft AI, built on OpenAI's advanced LLMs.
features: Secure, web-grounded AI chat.
Integration with Microsoft 365 apps, including Word, Excel, and PowerPoint.
Enterprise data protection and Microsoft Graph grounding.
Image generation capabilities.
items.models: OpenAI's advanced LLMs such as the GPT-4, GPT-5, and GPT-5.5 series.
items.pricing: Free version for eligible M365 users; paid plans starting at $20/month.

items.name: Claude Code
items.description: Terminal-based interface for Anthropic's Claude models, optimized for coding, debugging, and documentation tasks within the CLI.
features: Conversational coding assistant in the terminal.
Reads and modifies local files safely.
Integrates with Git and code editors.
items.pricing: Included with Claude Pro and Team plans; usage-based API billing for enterprise access.

items.name: Aider
items.description: Open-source CLI coding assistant that edits your codebase with GPT, Claude, or Gemini through Git-tracked commits.
features: Works directly on your repo with automatic commits.
Supports multiple LLM backends, including GPT, Claude, and Gemini.
Context-aware editing via diff-based workflow.
items.pricing: Open-source and free to use; API key required for external LLMs.

items.name: ForgeCode
items.description: Developer-focused AI CLI that integrates with your local environment to assist with coding and debugging.
features: Local-first coding assistant with shell integration.
Supports context sharing between files and commands.
Plugin system for custom workflows.
items.pricing: Free tier available with limited usage; paid plans for advanced features.

items.name: Codex CLI
items.description: Command-line interface for OpenAI's Codex models offering code generation and completion in the terminal.
features: Autocompletion and inline code generation.
Natural language to shell command translation.
Integration with editors and REPLs.
items.pricing: Pay-as-you-go via OpenAI API; free credits available for new accounts.

items.name: OpenCode
items.description: AI-powered coding platform designed to assist with software development through structured workflows.
features: Supports code generation, editing, and refactoring across projects.
Operates over full repositories with awareness of project structure.
Enables multi-step workflows, including planning and reviewing code.
items.pricing: Free tier available; paid plans for advanced features.

items.name: Antigravity
items.description: Agent-first software development platform from Google that enables developers to orchestrate autonomous coding agents across projects, tools, and workflows.
features: Multi-agent environment for planning, coding, debugging, and task execution.
Integrated editor, terminal, browser, and agent management capabilities.
Includes Antigravity CLI and SDK for terminal-based and programmable workflows.
items.pricing: Free preview tier available; advanced usage tied to Google AI and Gemini plans.

items.name: Cursor
items.description: AI-native code editor with agent capabilities that can understand, modify, and navigate entire codebases.
features: Deep integration with the code editor for inline edits and multi-file changes.
Agent mode supports autonomous code modifications across a repository.
Context-aware understanding of code structure and dependencies.
items.pricing: Free tier available; paid plans for extended usage and advanced models.
